title: hieracium juranum subsp. lagopinum
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. lagopinum, also known as the Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Hieracium juranum subsp. lagopinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
